description: Evals covering image insertion, comment management, and track changes

evals.name: Create docx with inline image and alt text
evals.description: Create a new document, embed a PNG as an inline image, set alt text, save, and validate that the image appears in the package and the alt text is present in wp:docPr/@descr.
evals.prompt: Create a new .docx file at /tmp/eval01.docx. Add a heading 'Image Test', add a paragraph 'See image below:', then add an inline image from /tmp/eval01_image.png with alt text 'A red square test image'. Save the document. Then validate it and confirm: (1) the file is valid, (2) stats.images == 1, (3) the string 'A red square test image' appears in the raw XML of word/document.xml.

evals.name: Insert a comment on a specific paragraph
evals.description: Open a freshly created document, insert a comment on paragraph 1 with specific author and text, save, and verify the comment appears with correct metadata.
evals.prompt: Create a .docx at /tmp/eval02_base.docx with two paragraphs: 'First paragraph' and 'Second paragraph'. Then open it, add a comment to paragraph index 1 (the second paragraph) with text='Review this section' and author='Alice'. Save to /tmp/eval02.docx. Read back the comments and confirm: (1) there is exactly 1 comment, (2) comment text is 'Review this section', (3) comment author is 'Alice'.

evals.name: Read comments from Apache POI test fixture
evals.description: Open the Apache POI comment.docx test fixture and read all comments. Verify at least one comment is present and has non-empty author and text fields.
evals.prompt: Open the file at /home/user/poi/test-data/document/comment.docx using open_document(). Call read_comments() on it and print the result as JSON. Confirm: (1) at least 1 comment is returned, (2) each comment has a non-empty 'author' field, (3) each comment has a non-empty 'text' field.

evals.name: Insert tracked deletion and accept all changes
evals.description: Create a document with a paragraph, insert a tracked deletion on that paragraph, verify the w:del element is present, then accept all changes and verify the w:del is gone and the text is removed.
evals.prompt: Create a .docx at /tmp/eval04_base.docx with one paragraph: 'Hello world this is a test'. Open it, insert a tracked deletion on paragraph 0 with text='this is a test' and author='Bob'. Save to /tmp/eval04_deleted.docx. Verify 'w:del' appears in word/document.xml. Then open /tmp/eval04_deleted.docx, call accept_all_changes(), save to /tmp/eval04_accepted.docx. Verify: (1) 'w:del' does NOT appear in /tmp/eval04_accepted.docx word/document.xml, (2) 'w:ins' does NOT appear either, (3) the document is valid.

evals.name: Round-trip edit: open POI fixture, add inline image, validate
evals.description: Open the Apache POI VariousPictures.docx fixture (which already has images), add another inline image with alt text, save to a new file, and validate the result has more images than before and is well-formed.
evals.prompt: Open /home/user/poi/test-data/document/VariousPictures.docx. Record the initial image count from validate(). Add a new inline image (use a simple 8x8 red PNG created in memory) with alt text='Round-trip test image'. Save to /tmp/eval05.docx. Validate /tmp/eval05.docx and confirm: (1) it is valid, (2) stats.images == initial_count + 1, (3) 'Round-trip test image' appears in word/document.xml.
